title: 誠實的音符
subtitle: Honest Notes
lyrics:
在花東的山海之間
有一百個小小窗口
沒有華麗的劇本
只有真實的脈搏

誠實的音符 落在紙上
像星星 點亮遠方
一句一句 沒有修飾
卻是生命 最真的故事
style: Quiet acoustic guitar, soft piano, children choir

title: 百元微光
subtitle: 手心向上的勇氣
lyrics:
百元微光 手心向上的力量
一字一句 都是飛翔的翅膀
不只是金錢 更是尊嚴的重量
微光匯聚 終會點亮太陽
style: Emotional piano, warm orchestral, children choir

title: 兩千座燈塔
subtitle: Two Thousand Lighthouses
lyrics:
兩千座燈塔 照亮每一條街道
百元的微光 匯聚成海嘯
當孩子 勇敢站起來
世界就會 重新盛開
style: Epic piano, distant choir, grand orchestra

title: 隨之而來的繁花
subtitle: The Resulting Blooms
lyrics:
When the rain falls gently on the ground
Seeds awaken, breaking through the soil
Petals unfold in the morning light
Every bloom tells a story of resilience

隨之而來的繁花
開在我們走過的路
每一朵都是記憶
每一瓣都是祝福
style: Indie folk, acoustic guitar, soft vocals, bilingual

title: One Hour Road
lyrics:
One hour on the road
Windows down, radio on
Miles of asphalt stretching out
Nothing behind, everything ahead

title: If That Day Without You
lyrics:
If that day without you
I would never have known
How the light could change
When someone truly sees you

title: City Night
subtitle: 都市的夜
lyrics:
Neon signs and empty streets
Footsteps echo in the rain
City night holds its breath
Waiting for the dawn

title: Summer Breeze
lyrics:
Summer breeze through the window
Carrying the scent of flowers
Lazy afternoon, nothing to do
Just the sky and you
